hero.tagline: Built for farmers with strong engineering, trusted performance, and machines designed for real field conditions.
hero.headline: Manufacturing powerful agricultural machinery for modern farming.

aboutSection.label: About us
aboutSection.headline: We manufacture durable agricultural machinery for farmers.
aboutSection.description: Jangid Agro Industries is a trusted agricultural machinery manufacturer based in India. We specialize in tractor-operated farming machines designed to improve productivity, reduce manual labor, and support farmers in villages and rural areas with reliable and long-lasting equipment.

aboutPage.label: About us
aboutPage.headline: Built with experience. Trusted by farmers.
aboutPage.subtext: Jangid Agro Industries delivers strong and practical agricultural machinery designed for farming conditions and village-level operations.

cards.title: Years of manufacturing experience
cards.description: Delivering durable agricultural machinery trusted by farmers and dealers across multiple regions.

cards.title: Machines delivered
cards.description: Our equipment is actively used in farms, villages, and agricultural operations throughout India.

cards.title: Customer support
cards.description: We focus on fast service, spare part availability, and dependable customer assistance.

aboutWhoWeAre.label: Who We Are
aboutWhoWeAre.headline: We are manufacturers dedicated to practical and reliable farming solutions.
aboutWhoWeAre.description: From trenching machines to crop processing equipment, we build agricultural machinery that helps farmers work faster, safer, and more efficiently in real farming environments.

items.title: Started as a local machinery workshop.
items.description: We began with a vision to create strong agricultural machines that could handle the real challenges faced by farmers in villages and rural India.

items.title: Expanded into tractor-operated machinery manufacturing.
items.description: Our product line grew with specialized machines designed for farming, digging, processing, and field operations.

items.title: Built a trusted network of customers and dealers.
items.description: Farmers across nearby districts and states started relying on our machines for dependable performance and long-term durability.

items.title: Continuing innovation for modern agriculture.
items.description: Today we continue to improve machine quality, efficiency, and design while staying committed to affordable solutions for farmers.

solutionsSection.label: Our machines
solutionsSection.headline: Engineered for farms.
solutionsSection.description: We manufacture practical agricultural machinery that improves productivity and supports modern farming operations.

cards.title: Trencher machines
cards.description: Heavy-duty tractor-operated trenching machines designed for digging strong and accurate trenches in agricultural land.

cards.title: Crop processing machines
cards.description: Efficient crop and seed processing equipment built for reliable performance and smooth operation.

cards.title: Custom agricultural equipment
cards.description: We also manufacture customized farming machinery according to specific agricultural and operational requirements.

sustainabilitySection.headline: Supporting efficient and productive farming.
sustainabilitySection.description: Our machines are designed to reduce hard manual labor, improve field efficiency, and help farmers complete work faster with reliable performance.

initiatives.title: Strong build quality
initiatives.description: Durable machines designed for long-term rural use

initiatives.title: Efficient field operation
initiatives.description: Machines that save valuable time and labor during farming work

whyChooseUsSection.label: Why choose us
whyChooseUsSection.headline: Trusted agricultural machinery built for real farming conditions.

cards.title: Strong & Durable Machines
cards.description: Our equipment is manufactured using quality materials and strong engineering for long-lasting field performance.

cards.title: Farmer-Focused Solutions
cards.description: Every machine is designed by understanding the practical needs of farmers and rural agricultural work.

cards.title: Reliable Service & Support
cards.description: We believe in long-term customer relationships through dependable support and trusted service.
